title: Write table-driven valid percentage tests
scenario: Several valid boundary cases should be easy to scan. A table-driven test keeps inputs and expected values together.
instructions: Add a #[cfg(test)] module with a test that loops over valid cases for 0, 50, and 100.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps percentage-valid-table-tests explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
